character.definition: (same as 姪) children of one's brother -- nephews or nieces, I; me (when speaking to a family friend of father's generation)
(variant of 熨) to iron, an iron for smoothing garments (same as 尉) to still; to quiet, a military official
(non-classical form of 裹) to wrap or bind
even, regular, uniform all alike; to arrange
not, no, negative; final particle; hexagram ䷋
(Cant.) vulgar, abusive term for female sex organ, cunt
